summary: Joe Reis shares updates on his podcast discussing the AI bubble and evolution of AI coding tools, provides progress on his Practical Data Modeling book, and curates a collection of industry reads highlighting skepticism around AI economics and OpenAI's challenges.
key_points: AI bubble discussion on podcast with Matt Housley
Practical Data Modeling book nearing completion with revised TOC coming
Curated reads questioning AI investment returns and OpenAI's viability
Speaking at multiple data conferences including Forward Data Conference in Paris
money_quotes: We talked about the elephant in the room, namely the AI Bubble.
Forward is rapidly becoming one of the best indie data events in the world.
key_insight: The data community is increasingly questioning AI hype and economics while continuing to build practical foundations in data modeling and engineering.
